text.title: OpenAPI Specification Failure Modes
text.summary: Antipatterns observed in real deployments of OpenAPI Specification. Each ties a symptom to a root cause and a concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: Same User schema inlined in three operation responses; one updated, two stale.
antipattern.fix: Move schema to components/schemas/User; reference via $ref everywhere.

antipattern.symptom: Generated TypeScript client treats every field as Partial; runtime crashes on missing keys.
antipattern.root-cause: Object schema authored without required array.
antipattern.fix: Add Spectral rule `oas3-schema-required` and fix all violations before merge.

antipattern.symptom: Mobile clients crash en masse after backend deploy; required field added to request schema.
antipattern.root-cause: No oasdiff gate; reviewer missed BREAK.
antipattern.fix: Wire oasdiff breaking in CI on every PR; require documented override for BREAK.

antipattern.symptom: openapi.yaml lists endpoints that no longer exist; docs lie about the API.
antipattern.fix: CI step `make openapi-snapshot && git diff --exit-code openapi.yaml`; fail build on drift.
